summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Apartment Rent Payment Kiosk System with major kwitantie redesign. All 11 requested kwitantie features working perfectly. Backend APIs generate KW- prefixed kwitantie numbers correctly. Auto-billing functionality maintains operation after full payments. Kiosk receipt screen displays countdown timer (8->0), auto-redirect, print/done buttons, and A4 geometric kwitantie preview. Admin kwitanties tab shows payment list with view buttons that open dialogs containing full A4 kwitantie with blue/orange geometric design, professional table layout, orange total bar, and company stamp.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/payments returns kwitantie_nummer with KW- prefix (KW-20260320-256E format)
Backend: Auto-billing still works after full rent payment - next month rent auto-added (SRD 2,800)
Kiosk receipt screen: countdown timer (8->0) with circular progress animation
Kiosk receipt screen: auto-redirect to welcome screen after countdown completes
Kiosk receipt screen: 'Kwitantie printen' button works (triggers print dialog)
Kiosk receipt screen: 'Klaar' button returns to welcome screen immediately
Kiosk receipt screen: right panel shows A4 kwitantie preview with geometric blue/orange shapes
Admin Kwitanties tab: payment list with kwitantie numbers (KW-) and view buttons
Admin Kwitanties tab: clicking view button opens dialog with full A4 kwitantie
Admin kwitantie dialog: blue header with kwitantie number, print button, and close button
Admin kwitantie dialog: geometric header/footer (8 clipPath elements), professional table, orange total bar, company stamp 'BETAALD VOLDAAN'
Full kiosk flow: welcome -> apartment selection -> tenant overview -> payment options -> confirm -> receipt with countdown -> auto-return to welcome
Kwitantie geometric design: blue (#1e3a8a) and orange (#f97316) angular shapes using clipPath
Professional A4 invoice layout with company logo, tenant details, payment table with blue headers
Orange total bar with 'TOTAAL BEDRAG' in white text on orange background
Company stamp with 'APPARTEMENT KIOSK BETAALD VOLDAAN' and green checkmark
Geometric footer with blue and orange angular shapes matching header design
Dutch interface throughout all kwitantie components and admin screens
SRD currency formatting consistent across all kwitantie elements
Responsive kwitantie preview in both kiosk receipt screen and admin dialog
